AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.about_text:
What is YourApp? 
YourApp allows you to create your own applications using artificial intelligence tools. You can select any model from Google Gemini AI and use that model to create simple applications. You must enter the model's API key yourself, and it must belong to you.

+ Is the API Key Secure? 
The API key you enter is encrypted within the application and saved in files.

+ How Do I Use It? 
While creating your application, you can run it by selecting options and typing a few words. How does this application work? The application creates a prompt in the background based on the options you enter and sends this information from your API key and model to the artificial intelligence. The artificial intelligence then writes the software, the application receives this code, converts it into an .exe file, and presents this converted file to you.

[!] WARNING :
This application is only compatible with API keys like Gemini. It may not be compatible with API keys of other AI systems and may produce erroneous results.

+ Open Source :
Keops Studios loves open source. This application is completely open source; you can explore its source code anytime. However, the code might be poorly done, sorry about that :)

+ Contact Us:
You can contact us through these links!

CreateAppPage.title: Create New App
CreateAppPage.informatin_text:
* Every application uses your API address. 

* You are responsible for the AI-powered application you create. 

* Your application may contain errors. 

[!] If the application appears unresponsive, do not close it. This error occurs because a process is running in the background.

WarningMessages.ApiNotFound: First, you need to enter an API key and select ai model. You can enter it in the settings.
WarningMessages.RepoNotFoundMSG: Warning! Problems may occur because the application's source repository could not be found.

AskMessages.ExitMessage: Are you sure you want to leave?
AskMessages.DeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this application? The application's Python code will also be deleted.

GlobalText.loading_screen_subtitle: Please wait, Your application is being made...
